Thanks for contributing to the Open Mission Software Landscape!
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- One-sentence summary. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Add a new item
- [ ] Update an existing item
- [ ] Archive an item (set `project: archived`)
- [ ] Add or update a category / subcategory
- [ ] Tooling / docs / workflow change

## Inclusion checklist (for new items)

- [ ] License is OSI-approved or NASA Open Source Agreement (NASA-1.3)
- [ ] Public code repository is set in `repo_url`
- [ ] Item is mission-related per [`docs/governance.md`](../docs/governance.md)
- [ ] `extra.annotations.submitter.org` and `submitter.type` are populated
- [ ] For NASA-maintained items: `nasa.center` is also set
- [ ] Item is inserted alphabetically by `name` within its subcategory
- [ ] Logo is either a real SVG checked into `logos/` OR `placeholder.svg`
- [ ] If the item belongs in multiple categories, `second_path` is set

## Validation

CI runs `landscape2 validate` automatically. If you ran it locally, paste
the result.
